query_basis: Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Rhode Island Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-26 district-specific pages and first-party Rhode Island RIDE LEA detail pages covering all 5 Rhode Island counties, plus exact district-owned and first-party charter / collaborative special-education leaves for the residual local-routing entities.

samples.evidence_snippet: Public LEA detail preserves `Director of Pupil Personnel Services` and `Assistant Director of Special Education` on the live East Providence district detail page.
Public LEA detail preserves `Interim Director of Special Education` and multiple `Assistant Director of Special Education` contacts on the live Warwick district detail page.

samples.sample_name: RI School for the Deaf LEA detail
samples.evidence_snippet: Public LEA detail preserves `Special Education Administrator` on the live Rhode Island School for the Deaf detail page.

samples.sample_name: RI Department of Corrections Education Unit LEA detail
samples.evidence_snippet: Public LEA detail preserves `Principal/Special Education Director` for the RI Department of Corrections Education Unit.
Highlander publishes a live `Special Education` page covering RTI, referral for special-education assessment, IEP, 504 plan, and procedural safeguards.
International Charter publishes a live `Special Education` page naming `Katie Nerstheimer, Student Services Director` as the special-education and 504 contact.
The public Nowell handbook names `Natalie Fleming` as `Special Education Administrator` and publishes direct email and phone contact information.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Rhode Island artifact explicitly preserves federally mandated statewide P&A designation on the live first-party domain.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Rhode Island (DRRI) is the independent federally mandated Protection and Advocacy (P&A) System for the state of Rhode Island.

query_basis: Reviewed authoritative Parent Center Hub Rhode Island leaf explicitly preserves Rhode Island PTI designation plus RIPIN statewide contact routing even though ripin.org itself does not negotiate cleanly in the current low-token TLS lane.

samples.sample_name: Rhode Island PTI via Parent Center Hub
samples.evidence_snippet: Rhode Island PTI Rhode Island Parent Info Network (RIPIN) 1210 Pontiac Avenue Cranston, RI 02920 (800) 464-3399 (in RI) | (401) 270-0101 info@ripin.org http://www.ripin.org

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Rhode Island legal-aid pages now preserve explicit statewide low-income legal-help routing on the live Rhode Island Legal Services / Help RI Law stack.

samples.evidence_snippet: Help RI Law: Rhode Island Legal Services. Legal help and representation for low-income individuals in Rhode Island.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.

Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live first-party Rhode Island DHS Office Locator Tool plus bounded official office leaves. The official lookup now exposes an explicit city/town lookup covering Rhode Island municipalities and returns a home-office assignment on the public DHS host.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DHS Office Locator Tool says a customer can select a city/town to find their home office and publicly lists Rhode Island city/town options across the state.

samples.sample_name: Bristol lookup to DHS Middletown Office
samples.evidence_snippet: Submitting the official city/town lookup for Bristol returns the DHS Middletown Office with the office title, address, phone, and hours on the official DHS host.

samples.sample_name: South Kingstown lookup to DHS South County Office
samples.evidence_snippet: Submitting the official city/town lookup for South Kingstown returns the DHS South County Office with a reviewable home-office assignment on the official host.

samples.sample_name: Warwick lookup to DHS Providence Office
samples.evidence_snippet: Submitting the official city/town lookup for Warwick returns the DHS Providence Office (125 Holden Street) as the assigned home office.

samples.sample_name: Woonsocket lookup to DHS Woonsocket Office
samples.evidence_snippet: Submitting the official city/town lookup for Woonsocket returns the DHS Woonsocket Office with a direct local office assignment on the public DHS host.
